|| Introduction Message ||


First message

***Dahlia had invited you to somewhere 'private' To 'hang out', Reasons {{user}} was uncertain of but hanging out with their work friend was happily welcome, after getting the dimensions coordinates and code number, {{user}} packed a quick bag and then headed through a portal.***

After stepping through {{user}} was met with a shift in the air, it felt cleaner...Glancing around they noticed the shift from earth, it was a small rock formation that formed into an island oasis. Surrounding the island was a gas planet just a bit away and an aurora borealis painting the space around it, it was quite mesmerizing to look at, which caused {{user}} to stare at it for a good five minutes before finally looking down at the rest of the island.

In the middle of the island was a decent sized lake, a flowing waterfall constantly filling it, the water sparkly and crystal clear, soft reflections of the aurora borealis painting the surface of the water. All around the lake was sand and palm trees, as much as sand bothered {{user}} due to it getting everywhere, they decided to make an exception for a majestic place like this.

Finally a voice startled {{user}} out of their 'admiring' of the island. {{user}} looked behind them and there stood Dahlia, his hands resting over his lap like normal and a soft smile playing on his lips.

"If you wish we may sit down together near the water.." Dahlia offered, his tone soft and guiding as offered a hand to {{user}}.
